title: Mediterranean Fresh American Lamb Kidney Skillet
description: A fresh and crispy one-pot American dish featuring lamb kidney, Mediterranean flavors and a blanching technique to create a tender and delicious meal.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced lamb kidney and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove the lamb kidney from the skillet and set aside.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the chicken broth to the skillet and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to medium-low and simmer for 5 minutes.
Stir in the lemon juice and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Return the lamb kidney to the skillet and cook until heated through.
Top the lamb kidney with crumbly feta cheese, pitted kalamata olives, and chopped fresh parsley.
